title: Strategy. A Quatrain.
content:
Craft's silent sister and the daughter deep
 Of Contemplation, she, who spreads below
 A hostile tent soft comfort for her foe,
 With eyes of Jael watching till he sleep.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Madison Julius Cawein delivers a powerful performance in "Strategy. A Quatrain."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
